mapper.select: SELECT id AS userId, name AS name, role AS role, NULL AS nickname, NULL AS bio, NULL AS avatarUrl, 0 AS projectCount, NULL AS email, NULL AS githubUrl, NULL AS websiteUrl, NULL AS discordTag FROM team_members ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id AS id, title AS title, description AS description, thumbnail_url AS thumbnailUrl, tech_stack AS techStack, status AS status FROM projects ORDER BY created_at DESC
